muddyCodeWorkspace.description:
Work in an Nx monorepo within a large-scale ERP multi-application system. The project involved development and maintenance of multiple business modules as well as shared components and services.

Scope of work in business modules:

• Sales module:
Customer dictionaries, client orders, price lists, and services.

• PMS:
Technological and production logic, release versions, order records, calculations (features, feature relations, quotation registry), extended dictionaries (tools, tool types, operations, workstations, station rates, qualifications, modifiers).

• Simulations:
Simulation versions and simulation records.

• WMS:
Index groups.

• LOGS:
System logs module (application log monitoring and presentation).

• MES:
Production monitoring and control system – handling production processes, employee work registration, production order tracking, material consumption records, and ongoing tracking of operation statuses.

System services and architecture

• QBE Service:
Building and handling Query By Example (QBE) queries.

• Attachment Service:
Upload and download of attachments with progress tracking (XMLHttpRequest with progress events), backend integration, and stream-based downloading on the frontend.

• User Settings – managing user settings stored in localStorage:
- table and view configurations
- language settings
- access control

• Authentication and session mechanisms
- login and session recovery
- token expiration handling and retrying requests after refresh
- request cancellation on user change
- HTTP interceptors for token and authentication handling
- idle timeout mechanism based on user activity (mouse event tracking)

Application and access management

• ActiveApp Service:
Control of available applications and features per user (permission system).

• UI components and layer
Shared components:
- loader
- attachment component
- error handling system based on snackbar service
- extended tree component (tree view, dynamic node add/remove, hover-based details preview, generation and presentation of process paths)
- development and support of components:
- modal system
- numeric keyboard component

For over 1.5 years in the project, I was responsible for developing the ERP system – on the frontend layer, service architecture, and shared components. The work included extending existing modules, implementing new features, and stabilizing and evolving the system in an enterprise environment.

muddyCodeSite.description: The “Muddy Code” website was built using the Wix platform. It is a simple website containing information about the company, its services, and a contact section enabling direct communication with clients.

familiaMedSite.description: Development and maintenance of the project, SEO work (search engine optimization), analysis and fixing of existing bugs, and refactoring of legacy system elements. Expansion of the homepage and subpages (including Familiamed Clinique – eyelid surgery), as well as improving performance and stability of the service. Continued development after previous teams, with a focus on improving code quality and user experience.

quickAtest.description: The single-page application “Quick Atest” was designed to streamline the process of creating and combining documents required for order execution. It allows content filtering, generating data for Excel files, and downloading selected documents as a single merged PDF file.

muddyCode.description: Since January 2024, I have been working as a Frontend Developer. I am responsible for developing and maintaining the frontend layer of web applications, ensuring functionality, performance, and user interface quality. I started with smaller projects and gradually took responsibility for more complex and extensive solutions. I collaborate with backend teams, UX/UI designers, and participate in the implementation of new features.

montService.description: I was responsible for diagnosing, repairing, and maintaining cash registers, payment terminals, and electronic devices used at points of sale. I serviced both hardware and electronic components, ensuring the proper functioning of sales systems. I performed installations, configurations, and troubleshooting, ensuring continuity of client operations.
